original_image_tags: A single, aged, greenish paper document page, photographed on a black background. The paper has a torn top-right corner and two hole-punch marks at the top. The page is filled with extremely faint, illegible typewritten text that appears to be a carbon copy or transfer impression, making it unreadable. The bottom portion of the page contains several clearer, stamped markings and handwritten annotations.

elements.description: Faded reversed text from the opposite side of the page is visible through the paper. Two dark circular hole punches and a small rectangular adhesive residue patch are present at the top edge.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on key visual elements (hole-punch marks, adhesive residue, and faded text showing through the paper), but Description A mentions a torn corner and handwritten annotations that Description B omits, without contradiction.
